title: Verify @kody bootstrap extend mode artifacts
description: Verify that the @kody bootstrap command generates and extends .kody/memory/, .kody/steps/, .kody/tools.yml artifacts and creates kody: lifecycle labels in GitHub. All artifacts already exist in the repository: 5 memory files (.kody/memory/), 6 step files (.kody/steps/), and .kody/tools.yml. Remaining verification: run `gh label list` to confirm kody: lifecycle labels exist in the GitHub repo.
